subject: Add cache-busting to data.js script tags
description: Add a cache-busting query parameter to all script tags referencing js/data.js across all HTML files (brands.html, index.html, search.html, compare.html, and their phonehub/ copies). Change src="js/data.js" to src="js/data.js?v=2" to ensure browsers load the fresh data after the category fix. This prevents users from seeing stale cached data.
activeForm: Adding cache-busting to data.js script tags
